title: Alphabet Financial Summary From 2025 Form 10-K
text: Alphabet's 2025 Form 10-K showed strong revenue, profitability, and cash generation. Full-year revenue was $402.8 billion, up 15% from $350.0 billion in 2024. Operating income was $129.0 billion, and operating margin remained about 32%. Net income was $132.2 billion, compared with $100.1 billion in 2024, and diluted EPS was $10.81. Google Services remained the largest profit contributor, with operating income of $139.4 billion, while Google Cloud operating income rose to $13.9 billion as the cloud business scaled. Other Bets continued to operate at a loss, reflecting Alphabet's investment in long-term projects such as Waymo. Alphabet ended 2025 with total assets of $595.3 billion and total cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities of $126.8 billion. Main risks include regulatory investigations, antitrust remedies, competition in AI and cloud, dependence on advertising, high infrastructure spending, and execution risk in newer businesses.
